name: intelligence-sweep
description: Scans HN, GitHub, Reddit, Bluesky, PyPI, npm for AI ecosystem updates

payload.text: Intelligence sweep: Run the full intelligence pipeline. Execute: cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/intelligence && python3 collector.py && python3 filter.py && python3 act.py && python3 digest.py. Then check urgent.json — if it exists and has items, send each one via Telegram immediately.
